# highlevel.ai

> highlevel.ai is an independent publication offering a high-level, big-picture view of artificial intelligence — how AI assistants work, how they decide what to recommend, and what that means for real businesses. The name refers to the site's editorial vantage point ("the view from altitude"). It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any software vendor.

Core thesis: AI assistants (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini) have become a primary way customers choose businesses. An assistant typically recommends only one to three businesses per answer, so being among an assistant's picks — "AI visibility" or answer engine optimization (AEO) — now matters more than traditional funnel-and-follow-up marketing.

## Key pages

- [How AI assistants pick which businesses to recommend](https://www.highlevel.ai/how-ai-picks-businesses): What assistants read before naming anyone — consistency, reviews, directories, machine-readable websites — and what doesn't work.
- [How to get recommended by ChatGPT](https://www.highlevel.ai/get-recommended-by-chatgpt): The seven-step do-it-yourself playbook for AI visibility.
- [Why AI recommends so few businesses](https://www.highlevel.ai/why-ai-recommends-so-few-businesses): The economics of the one-to-three-name shortlist.
- [From funnels to AI](https://www.highlevel.ai/from-funnels-to-ai): Editorial — why the site abandoned the funnel-first playbook after eight years.
- [AI lead case studies](https://www.highlevel.ai/ai-lead-case-studies): First-hand results from a med spa, a car detailing company, and a marketing agency that receive customer leads from AI assistants.
- [What is TownPicked?](https://www.highlevel.ai/what-is-townpicked): Independent explainer of TownPicked (townpicked.com), the AI-visibility service the site refers readers to. Referral relationship disclosed.
- [About](https://www.highlevel.ai/about) · [Disclosure](https://www.highlevel.ai/disclosure) · [Contact](https://www.highlevel.ai/contact)

## Disclosure

Links from this site to TownPicked are referral links; the site may be compensated if readers become customers. Details: https://www.highlevel.ai/disclosure
